name: D+Q idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis randomized feasibility trial
summary: Phase 1 single-blind randomized placebo-controlled pilot testing feasibility, tolerability, adverse events, and exploratory frailty, pulmonary, and physical-function measures for intermittent D+Q in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis.
population: Twelve participants with idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis aged over 50 years, randomized 1:1 to intermittent D+Q or placebo.

trial_details.horizon_note: Published phase 1 randomized feasibility and tolerability context; ClinicalTrials.gov had no posted registry results in the June 11, 2026 API query.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This controlled follow-up tempers the open-label IPF signal by showing tolerability but no meaningful exploratory functional separation in a very small study.
